scripts.dev: concurrently -n "FLASK_API,SHOP_APP,COMMUNITY" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run community"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd flask-backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../community-frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "cd flask-backend && python app.py" "cd frontend && npm start" "cd community-frontend && npm start"
